_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to continually research and develop new tools/techniques
reference_document_element_description: Ability to evaluate and adopt new technologies, frameworks, and tools for data and AI work, assessing maturity, community support, integration requirements, and organizational fit before recommending adoption.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-001 (TF, cosine: 0.542), LS-S-004 (LS, cosine: 0.507).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.6/10 (raw 0.560). Shared vocabulary: [ability, new, tools]. DCWF-only terms [continually, develop, research, techniques] vs WIDAI-only terms [adopt, adoption, ai, assessing, community, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.869 (P=0.885, R=0.852). P exceeds R by 0.033 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 27 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Ability to continually research and develop new tools/techniques" and "Ability to evaluate and adopt new technologies, frameworks, and tools for data a" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.573 ≈ STS 0.560 (gap 0.014). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ability, new, tools] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 17.9%. Shared tokens: [ability, new, tools]. DCWF-only: [continually, develop, research, techniques]. WIDAI-only: [adopt, adoption, ai, assessing, community, data].
